itemDescription: Establishment of a small project choir in which two to three works are rehearsed to a performance-ready level. In the program “Nordic Voices” we undertake an excursion through various stylistic periods of the scandinavian A Capella choir music – from Barock to New Music/Jazz. We become acquainted with Grieg, Nystedt, Söderman and Lindberg, who are (unjustly) not well-known in germany. The weekly rehearsal includes regular warm-up, improvisation exercises, voice training and training on the pieces. The goal of this program is to get to know about various styles and periods of a very different culture, train your own voice at the same time and - above all - have fun with singing.
